suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update 'Project Structure' section to document that root-level tests/ directory is the convention for cross-area integration tests, in addition to <module>/tests/ for per-module unit tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature cross-area-integration placed integration tests in tests/test_cross_area.py (root level), which required adding 'tests' to testpaths in pyproject.toml. AGENTS.md currently only states 'Tests go in <module>/tests/ directory'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Fix VAL-EXPORT-001 GGUF magic number: change 0x46475547 to 0x46554747 (correct little-endian encoding of 'GGUF'). The implementation in gguf_export.py uses the correct value 0x46554747.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: validation-contract.md VAL-EXPORT-001 states '0x46475547'. The actual GGUF magic number in gguf_export.py is 0x46554747 which is G=0x47, G=0x47, U=0x55, F=0x46 in little-endian byte order.
